narrative:
Perrysburg I (precinct in Wood County) has 1,120 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
